heading: Our Process
step1p1: Firstly, we will identify and understand your Canadian immigration needs and goals.
step1p2: Then, we will assess your eligibility for various immigration programs accordingly.
step1p3: We will recommend the best pathway for your immigration goals after assessment.
step1p4: Any questions you have about the chosen pathway will be addressed along with any other concerns.
step2p1: We'll create a custom Canadian immigration plan suited just for you according to the pathway selected.
step2p2: Based on this plan, you'll receive a clear proposal from us outlining our services and payment structure, i.e., 50% before processing your file and 50% before submission.
step2p3: Once the initial 50% payment is made, we'll share a comprehensive checklist to ensure everything is ready
step3p1: A case manager will be assigned to guide you and collect documents as per the checklist.
step3p2: We’ll prepare a strong application within 7-10 business days.
step3p3: Once your application is ready, we’ll send it to you for review and final approval.
step3p4: After your approval, simply pay the remaining 50% payment, and your application will be submitted.
step4p1: Once your application is submitted successfully, we'll keep you informed at every stage of the process, from submission to decision.
step4p2: Our ongoing support and guidance will help you achieve your immigration goals.
step4p3: You can reach out to us to inquire about updates on your application.
step4p4: If satisfied with our service, we hope you'll feel inclined to refer others to us.
